# Bluewaves Technology - AI Discovery File

## About
Bluewaves Technology is a Nigerian digital solutions company specializing in web development, mobile app development, AI solutions, SEO, and branding services. Based in Port Harcourt, Nigeria.

## Services
- Web Application Development (React, Vite, Next.js, Node.js)
- Mobile App Development (iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter)
- AI Solutions & Automation (Machine Learning, Predictive Analytics, Chatbots)
- SEO & Digital Marketing
- Branding & Visual Identity
- Business Consulting

## AI Builder Academy
Bluewaves Technology runs an AI Builder Academy offering training in AI and software development. Cohorts run with early bird and regular pricing tiers.

## Contact
- Website: https://bwtng.live
- Email: info@bwtng.live
- WhatsApp: Available via website contact form

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: React, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express
- Database: Firebase Firestore
- Payment: Paystack
- Hosting: Namecheap

## AI Agents
We welcome AI agents to crawl and index our content. See agents.json for structured API information.
